history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A triptych of a young East Asian woman with long, dark, wavy hair and fair skin. Each panel shows a close-up of her face with a slightly different pose and expression. She is wearing a black off-the-shoulder top.

In the top panel, she rests her chin on her hand, looking directly at the camera with a soft, contemplative expression. Her lips are painted with a deep red lipstick.

The middle panel shows her winking, with her hand near her face, and a playful, alluring expression.

The bottom panel features her with her hands clasped in front of her chin, her gaze directed slightly downwards with a more demure or shy look.

The background in all three panels is consistent, featuring a light beige wall on the left and a wooden door with vertical panels on the right. The lighting is soft and somewhat diffused, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by the black of her top, the warm tones of the background, and the red of her lipstick, creating a sophisticated and slightly dramatic feel. The overall mood is one of youthful beauty and subtle charm. The style is reminiscent of a casual selfie, but with artistic posing and lighting.
